Update reconcile cron to 10am/2pm/4pm/10pm ET in routines UI
narrative: Redistribute 4 reconcile runs for better day-long coverage (Option A). New cron (EDT Mar-Nov): `0 14,18,20,2 * * *` = 10am / 2pm / 4pm / 10pm ET daily. EST flip (Nov-Mar): `0 15,19,21,3 * * *`. Replaces current `0 11,16,22,2 * * *` which wasted fires on 7am (duplicates 6:57am Morning Brief drain) and 6pm (duplicates 6:03pm EOD drain). New schedule fills weekday afternoon gap (3:23pm SC → 6:03pm EOD) via 4pm reconcile, keeps weekend afternoon coverage. After applying in routines UI, update prompts/reconcile.md line 3 to match. Set calendar reminder for Nov DST flip.

title: Confirm 10pm reconcile drained pending queue
narrative: Verify tonight's 10pm ET reconcile ran successfully and drained the 4 pending cloud actions queued on 2026-04-16: (1) mark PA-60 done — Carole/Samara INQ entity confirmed; (2) mark PA-10 done — VCP contract sent; (3) add_task — Carole/Samara to reply on VCP contract (follow_up, due Apr 21, PA-new); (4) add_task — redistribute reconcile crons (self, PA-new). Check: vault/cloud-actions.jsonl should be empty (or contain only errored entries); git log should show a `reconcile: applied 4 cloud actions, cache resynced` commit around 10pm-10:15pm ET Apr 16; Notion Active Items view should show PA-60 and PA-10 as done, and the 2 new PA- items present. If the reconcile didn't run or left items errored, investigate via routines UI run history.
